name: Married filing jointly - High household income
description: Married couple with €150,000 household income in Berlin, capped social security, no Soli

sources.description: Income tax (€33,776) computed via §32a EStG 2025 with Ehegattensplitting: split=66,169 (Zone 3), single tax=16,888 × 2. Soli exempt: 33,776 < 39,900 married threshold.
sources.notes: Berlin (BE) standard care rate 2.4% childless. Pension cap €96,600, health/care cap €66,150. Sonderausgaben €72 (married). zvE = 150,000 - 17,661.53 = 132,338. Split income = 66,169. Zone 3 formula gives 16,888, doubled = 33,776. Soli exempt (33,776 < 39,900 threshold).
